source.releaseCommitMessage: Mejorar rendimiento, tienda y acceso mobile

releaseContents: Estado pending de autenticacion para evitar el destello de acceso durante la recarga mobile.
Tienda visual con catalogo inicial de emotes Noto y categorias de accesorios.
Gate de participacion para invitados y actividad relativa en la lista de temas.
Compresion Brotli/gzip, ETag, cache estatica acotada y cache de tarjetas sociales.
Relay de eventos live compatible con una instancia y separacion de modulos secundarios.
Mascota WebP y ajustes de carga diferida, SEO y copy publico.

backup.reason: No hay migraciones, pero se creo un punto de recuperacion fresco antes del deploy.

preDeployChecks.localQa: passed: 182 deterministic tests and 12 smoke checks
preDeployChecks.secretScan: no credential-like additions in the staged release diff
preDeployChecks.formatCheck: existing Prettier debt remains in 27 touched files; no bulk rewrite was applied
preDeployChecks.environment: required production, database, origin and auth variables present
preDeployChecks.branchSync: main matched origin/main before the release commit

postDeployVerification.shell: 200 with deployed store and version markers
postDeployVerification.authentication: GET /api/auth/status returned 200 with OIDC, session secret, Turnstile and email checks configured
postDeployVerification.bootstrap: 200 guest payload with 17 topics and no session ID in the body
postDeployVerification.staticDelivery: versioned catalog returned immutable cache headers, ETag, conditional 304 and Brotli at the Render origin
postDeployVerification.newAssets: store catalog, first emote and mascot WebP returned 200
postDeployVerification.liveEvents: GET /api/live returned text/event-stream and an initial ready event

browser.flow: topic list, topic selection, guest composer gate and return to list passed without writes
browser.authReload: pending banner hidden, then logged-out login/register banner visible after bootstrap

metrics.assessment: CPU and memory settled below the pre-deploy maxima, disk usage stayed flat, and no stop condition occurred.

rollback.databaseCompatibility: No schema migration was applied; the previous deploy can use the same database unchanged.
rollback.procedure: Redeploy dep-d9fgc7t8nd3s73f6vsb0 if a code rollback is required. Restore the logical backup only if persistent data integrity is affected.

unresolvedRisks: Repository-wide Prettier debt remains outside this release.
The live relay and SQLite deployment remain single-instance components.
Render deploys on commit rather than waiting for CI; local QA completed before push and remote CI passed during deploy.
